name: codeviz-skill
description: Render Spec Kit tasks.md as a realtime project progress map.

scripts.check: node --check bin/codeviz.js && node --check src/parser.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/inferencer.js && node --check src/git-tracker.js && node --check src/project-manager.js && node --check src/watcher.js && node --check templates/client.js
